JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.title: Internal Star Map
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.description:
Jiang Xiao only. Core Relic. 
 Whenever a battle is won, gain Skill Points (Normal/Event +625, Elite +1250, Boss +2500). 
 Currently has [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Automatically grants [red]Star Map Abilities[/red], [red]Star Skill Quality Relic[/red], and [red]Star Power Level Relic[/red].)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.flavor: A mysterious star map residing within the mind; the starting point of Jiang Xiao's path as a toxic healer.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.title: Internal Star Map+
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.descrip:
Jiang Xiao only. Core Relic. 
 Whenever a battle is won, gain Skill Points (Normal/Event +1250, Elite +2500, Boss +5000). 
 Currently has [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Automatically grants [red]Star Map Abilities[/red], [red]Star Skill Quality Relic[/red], and [red]Star Power Level Relic[/red].)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.flavor: A mysterious star map residing within the mind; the starting point of Jiang Xiao's path as a toxic healer.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.title: Star Power Level
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.descriptio:
Current Star Power Level: [gold]{level:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6):Stardust Stage|Nebula Stage|Galaxy Stage|Star Sea Stage|Starry Sky Stage|Astral Zenith Stage}[/gold]. 
 Gain [gold] {energy} [/gold] additional Energy.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.flavor: Star power surges like the tides; every star ignited signifies a qualitative leap.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.title: Star Skill Quality
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.flavor: Quality determines the purity of star power; from Bronze to Scorching Sun lies the chasm between mortal and god.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.title: Basic Arts
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.description:
Records your combat training. Gain +1 point for the corresponding type whenever a card of that type is played. Every [gold]10[/gold] points increases [gold]1[/gold] Rank.

Unarmed Combat: Rank [gold]{UnarmedR}[/gold] ({UnarmedP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: Draw 1 random Skill card from your Draw Pile.[/blue]
Xia Style Blade: Rank [gold]{BladeR}[/gold] ({BladeP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: Draw 1 random Blade Style card from your Discard Pile.[/blue]
Archery Mastery: Rank [gold]{BowR}[/gold] ({BowP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: Gain [gold]1[/gold] Energy.[/blue]
Dagger Mastery: Rank [gold]{DaggerR}[/gold] ({DaggerP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: [gold]25%[/gold] chance to gain [gold]1[/gold] Energy and play a copy.[/blue]
Halberd Mastery: Rank [gold]{HalberdR}[/gold] ({HalberdP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: Deal an additional [gold]25%[/gold] of current damage to all enemies.[/blue]
Combat Knife Mastery: Rank [gold]{CombatKnifeR}[/gold] ({CombatKnifeP}/60)
[blue]Rank 4: Randomly play 2 Attack or Skill card from your Exhaust Pile.[/blue]
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.flavor: Every training session and every drop of sweat is a cornerstone for reaching the peak.
